name: brains
description: Your memory layer: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and prior Claude conversations as queryable pages, with reflexive recall, turn-by-turn capture, a server-driven inbox, and boards/automations/workflows on top.

token.title: brains API token
token.description: Bearer token for your brain. Used for the MCP server and the ingest/inbox hooks. Find it in your brains account settings.

endpoint.title: brains endpoint
endpoint.description: Base URL of your brains server (no trailing slash). The plugin derives /mcp, /ingest/claude, and /inbox/claude from it.
